steps.title: Complete the thought with a main verb
steps.content: The subject "Scientists" needs a finite verb to complete the independent clause. The verb must also be able to introduce the following that-clause about the secret to Roman concrete's durability.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choices B, C, and D are nonfinite verb forms, so none can serve as the main verb of the sentence. The remaining form is a present-tense finite verb that agrees with the plural subject and governs the that-clause. The answer is A.
